---
title: "Economic Intelligence"
---

# 🌍 African Economic Intelligence

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth tracks economic indicators that directly affect households, businesses, investors, and policymakers across Africa.

Our goal is to bridge data gaps across emerging and frontier economies through localized, accessible, and data-driven economic intelligence.

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🥖 Inflation & Food Prices

Track inflation trends, consumer prices, and retail marketplace fluctuations across African cities and regions.

[Open Food Price Dashboard](https://dashboard.dahowealth.com/economy){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

</div>

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 💱 Foreign Exchange Matrix & Forex Trends 

Live foreign exchange intelligence tracking major African currencies against global benchmarks and reserve currencies.

### Key Features

* **Cross-Regional FX Matrix** — Monitor the West African CFA Franc (UEMOA), Central African CFA Franc (CEMAC), Nigerian Naira, Ghanaian Cedi, Kenyan Shilling, South African Rand, and Euro from a single dashboard.

* **Performance Analytics** — Analyze 1-Year currency performance, exchange-rate trends, and relative movements against the U.S. Dollar with continuously updated market data.

* **Interactive FX Explorer** — Access historical exchange-rate charts, currency-specific market profiles, regional intelligence, and dynamic conversion tools for major African currencies.

* **Currency Intelligence Profiles** — Explore currency regions, monetary unions, participating countries, and exchange-rate behavior across Africa's largest economies.

[Launch Forex Hub](https://dashboard.dahowealth.com/fx){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 📊 GDP & Macroeconomics

Analyze GDP growth, purchasing power, commodity exposure, and regional economic performance indicators.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## ⛽ Commodity Intelligence

Track fuel prices, agricultural commodities, transportation costs, and energy-related market variables.

</div>

</div>

---

<div class="glass-card">

## Initial Coverage

The first datasets begin with Benin and West Africa, with future expansion planned across broader African markets.

Future dashboards will include:

- 🌡️ Inflation heatmaps
- 🥖 Food price volatility
- 🏙️ Cost-of-living analysis
- 🌍 Regional economic comparisons
- 💵 Consumer purchasing power indexes
- ⛽ Commodity trend tracking
- 📊 Economic visualization dashboards

</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2026 Daho Wealth • Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jpsossavi/" target="_blank">
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    •

    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Daho-Wealth-61575871481173/" target="_blank">
      Facebook
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
